initiatives.name: Racine Mutual Aid
initiatives.description: A grassroots network coordinating mutual aid and community support initiatives in Racine. They organize direct assistance, resource sharing, and neighborhood solidarity while building sustainable networks of care and support through community organizing and collective action.

initiatives.name: Racine Voces de la Frontera
initiatives.description: Voces de la Frontera is Wisconsin's leading immigrant rights & low-wage workers center.

initiatives.name: Green Light Project
initiatives.description: Organizers in Racine, WI that educate and empower communities and liberation movements.
